proposals.current_text: System MUST receive webhooks from Jira and acknowledge with HTTP 200 within 500ms
proposals.proposed_text: System MUST receive webhooks from Jira and acknowledge with HTTP 202 (Accepted) within 500ms
proposals.rationale: HTTP 202 is semantically correct for async processing per RFC 7231

proposals.current_text: System MUST transition Jira tickets through workflow states as phases complete
proposals.proposed_text: System MUST track workflow progress using forge: labels on Jira tickets. Labels indicate current phase (e.g., forge:prd-pending, forge:spec-approved). This approach enables workflow visibility without requiring custom Jira workflow configurations in each target project.
proposals.rationale: Label-based approach works across any Jira project without admin configuration

proposals.current_text: System MUST support concurrent execution across multiple repositories
proposals.proposed_text: System MUST support concurrent execution across multiple repositories, with a default limit of 5 concurrent repository workspaces to manage resource consumption. This limit is configurable.
proposals.rationale: Unbounded concurrency would exhaust system resources

proposals.current_text: Webhook acknowledgment occurs within 500ms for 99% of events
proposals.proposed_text: Webhook endpoints SHOULD respond promptly. Response time monitoring is available via the /metrics endpoint.
proposals.rationale: Removes hard SLA without monitoring infrastructure in place

proposals.description: Implement _check_epic_completion to query Jira for child Tasks and verify all are Done

tasks.name: Rate Limit Handling
tasks.description: Add exponential backoff and 429 retry logic

tasks.name: Webhook Retry/Dead-Letter
tasks.description: Add failed event persistence and retry queue

tasks.name: Branch Conflict Detection
tasks.description: Check for remote changes before push

tasks.name: Guardrails Validation
tasks.description: Add explicit warnings for missing guardrails

tasks.name: Merge Conflict Detection
tasks.description: Detect conflicts and escalate to blocked

proposals.title: User Story 13 - System Metrics
proposals.modification: Softened SC-013 to remove hard 100ms SLA
